title: hypericum suffruticosum
intro: Hypericum suffruticosum, also known as small St. John's wort, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to Europe and western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to exhibit analgesic and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Hypericum suffruticosum include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Hypericum suffruticosum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile remedy in natural medicine.
